scope: Report-only competitor gap assessment for temporal/history memory, lifecycle smoke, and future ELF optimization direction
role_boundary: No ELF optimization implementation is included; this report records evidence, claim boundaries, and future optimization directions.

executive_judgment.summary: ELF is a credible personal-production foundation, but the current evidence does not prove broad superiority across all tracked memory projects or all user-important scenarios.
executive_judgment.main_reason: In live memory-evolution jobs, ELF retrieves the required evidence but does not represent current, historical, superseded, and deleted facts as explicit answer and trace state.

basic_local_lifecycle.claim: ELF and mem0 both pass the encoded local Docker lifecycle smoke; this does not prove ELF beats mem0/OpenMemory on its strongest product surfaces.

elf.diagnosis: ELF retrieved all required memory-evolution evidence but did not emit lifecycle-aware current-vs-historical answer behavior on five jobs.

qmd.diagnosis: qmd had the same missing temporal-conflict pattern and additionally missed evidence, including the delete tombstone.

job_matrix.diagnosis: ELF found current verdict, caveat, and rationale but did not represent the superseded verdict as historical.
Both found current runbook and rationale, but neither preserved the old quickstart path as historical.
Both found current done state and rationale, but neither surfaced the earlier blocked state as history.
ELF found current preference and rationale, but did not preserve old preference history.
Both found current and old owners, but did not emit temporal-validity explanation.
ELF found tombstone and current plan; qmd missed tombstone.

graphiti_zep_temporal_smoke.failure_reason: Graphiti/Zep live temporal search requires an explicit provider API key; no hosted Zep service or unrecorded provider credentials were used.
graphiti_zep_temporal_smoke.claim: Graphiti/Zep remains a temporal-validity reference, but no live pass or ELF superiority claim is supported.

scenario_judgments.next_gate: mem0/OpenMemory history and UI/export readback benchmark
ELF/qmd trace-level replay and wrong-result diagnosis
ELF live memory_evolution pass for all six jobs
contained Letta export path and core-vs-archival jobs
private-corpus and credentialed production-ops evidence only when operator inputs exist

optimization_direction_order.description: Add answer and trace semantics for current winner, historical loser, update rationale, tombstone, and supersession state.
optimization_direction_order.benchmark_gate: ELF live memory_evolution pass for all six jobs.

optimization_direction_order.description: Move past basic update/delete smoke into preference history, entity memory, lifecycle inspection, deletion audit, and UI/export readback.
optimization_direction_order.benchmark_gate: Comparable ELF and mem0/OpenMemory history jobs with typed evidence classes.

optimization_direction_order.description: Expose query expansion, sparse/dense retrieval, fusion, rerank, dropped candidates, conflict candidates, and replay commands.
optimization_direction_order.benchmark_gate: Every wrong result has a replayable trace that localizes absent, dropped, selected-but-not-narrated, or contradicted evidence.

optimization_direction_order.description: Evaluate Letta-style core memory blocks with provenance, attachment rules, stale-core detection, and archival fallback.
optimization_direction_order.benchmark_gate: Core-vs-archival jobs prove correct attachment, sharing, update visibility, and stale-core avoidance.

optimization_direction_order.description: Score safe capture, reviewable consolidation, cited knowledge pages, timelines, and operator UX as live surfaces.
optimization_direction_order.benchmark_gate: Live capture, consolidation, knowledge, and operator-debugging suites move from not_encoded or fixture-only to comparable evidence.

optimization_direction_order.description: Measure Graphiti/Zep, RAGFlow, LightRAG, GraphRAG, graphify, OpenViking, llm-wiki, and gbrain with evidence-linked output contracts.
optimization_direction_order.benchmark_gate: Docker-contained or explicitly typed provider-backed adapters emit scored evidence outputs.

allowed: ELF+mem0 basic local lifecycle smoke passed in the fresh Docker baseline.
ELF narrowly outperformed qmd on the fresh memory-evolution slice because ELF passed delete/TTL and qmd did not.
ELF still failed five of six live memory-evolution jobs.
Graphiti/Zep temporal smoke is typed blocked due missing explicit provider key.
Letta is a design reference, not a measured comparable competitor in this report.
not_allowed: ELF beats all tracked memory projects.
ELF beats mem0/OpenMemory on UI, hosted behavior, entity history, or graph memory.
ELF beats Graphiti/Zep on temporal validity.
ELF beats Letta on core-vs-archival memory.
Fixture pass, baseline smoke pass, and live real-world pass are interchangeable evidence classes.

next_issue_directions: P0 ELF live temporal reconciliation and trace contract
P0 mem0/OpenMemory history and UI/export readback benchmark
P0 ELF/qmd trace-level replay and wrong-result diagnosis
P2 Graphiti/Zep provider-backed temporal smoke after explicit provider credentials exist
P2 graph/RAG and knowledge-page Docker-contained evidence adapters
